epic.name: End-to-End Testing & Validation
epic.objective: Validate the complete v0.1 flow works as specified
epic.definition_of_done: Full flow tested: Prometheus alert -> Incident -> Slack -> UI -> Acknowledge/Resolve, with documented test results

tasks.name: Write integration tests for webhook flow
tasks.description: Automated tests for alert -> incident creation
acceptance_criteria: Test: Alertmanager payload creates alert record
Test: Info alert does not create incident

tasks.name: Write integration tests for incident API
tasks.description: Automated tests for incident CRUD operations

tasks.name: Create manual E2E test script
tasks.description: Document manual test procedure for full flow

tasks.name: Perform E2E validation
tasks.description: Execute complete flow and document results
acceptance_criteria: Slack channel created with correct name
Initial message posted with incident details
Incident detail page shows all data
Acknowledge from UI updates status and posts to Slack
Resolve from UI updates status and posts to Slack
